cities.name: Sydney, Australia
cities.description: A vibrant city known for its iconic Opera House and beautiful harbour beaches.

cities.name: Melbourne, Australia
cities.description: Famous for its cultural diversity, arts scene, and rich coffee culture.

cities.name: Tokyo, Japan
cities.description: A bustling metropolis blending ultra-modern neon skyscrapers with historic temples.

cities.name: Kyoto, Japan
cities.description: Renowned for its historic Buddhist temples, gardens, and traditional wooden houses.

temples.name: Angkor Wat, Cambodia
temples.description: A massive architectural masterpiece and the largest religious monument in the world.

temples.name: Taj Mahal, India
temples.description: An iconic ivory-white marble mausoleum on the south bank of the Yamuna river.

beaches.name: Bora Bora, French Polynesia
beaches.description: A South Pacific island famous for turquoise lagoons and luxury overwater bungalows.

beaches.name: Copacabana, Brazil
beaches.description: A vibrant crescent-shaped beach set against Rio de Janeiro's iconic skyline.
